trigger: Build a config_only runtime package for an AI node — no custom binary, just a system prompt and default config.

files.prompts/system.txt: You are an AI assistant specialized in...

constraints: package.json must include: name (lowercase, dots/hyphens allowed), version (semver), type, runtime_base
runtime_base must match one of the available runtimes in known_context.available_runtimes
name in package.json must be lowercase with no spaces
do_not_repeat: do not use 'full_runtime' as type for config_only packages — use 'config_only'
do not invent a runtime_base that is not in the known available runtimes
do not omit package.json or config/default-config.json — both are required
do not include binary files or executables in inline_package artifacts

trigger: Build a workflow definition artifact for a WF node deployment.

artifact.description: Invoice approval workflow with multi-step validation

constraints: workflow_name must be unique per hive and match the wf_deployment in the manifest
each step must have a unique 'id' field
do_not_repeat: do not use numeric step ids — use string ids like 's1', 's2'
do not reference nodes that do not exist in the desired_state manifest
do not omit the 'type' field on each step

trigger: Build an OPA Rego policy bundle for authorization or routing decisions.
constraints: rego_source must start with a 'package' declaration
package name must follow Rego naming convention (lowercase, dots as namespace separators)
the artifact must contain 'rego_source' as a top-level field
do_not_repeat: do not omit the 'package' declaration — it is required by OPA
do not embed raw JSON in Rego — use input.* references instead
do not use 'allow = true' as default — always default to false for security
